meaning: n.空间,间隔,距离,空地,余地,一段时间vt.留间隔,隔开
examples: One needs space to be oneself.
He needed space to be himself.
She needed space to be herself.
Now the space-sciences division watches for its work popping up in more popular contexts.
Is eBay missing the boat by not throwing itself into the blossoming social networking space?
